metadata.description: Claude Code plugin bundles — skill packs that extend Claude with domain-specific superpowers

plugins.name: airtable-super-creator
plugins.description: Complete Airtable development toolkit — 16 skills, 8 agents, 10 commands covering every Airtable Web API endpoint

plugins.name: vapi-super-creator
plugins.description: Complete voice AI toolkit for Vapi — 18 skills, 5 agents, 7 commands to build and manage voice assistants

plugins.name: canvas-design
plugins.description: Production-grade visual design with HTML/CSS + Playwright — 8 skills, 5 agents, 8 commands for covers, posters, social media, thumbnails, brand assets, and abstract art

plugins.name: remotion-super-creator
plugins.description: Professional video creation with Remotion (React/TypeScript) — 9 skills, 6 agents, 7 commands for social media, explainers, kinetic typography, data viz, slideshows, audiograms, intros/outros, and news highlights
